title: Home
description: Representing and supporting general practice in Manchester since 1974.

title: About Manchester LMC
description: Who we are, what we do, and how Manchester LMC works for GPs across the city.

title: Our Team
description: Meet the Manchester LMC committee members, officers, and administrative staff.

title: How We're Funded
description: How Manchester LMC is funded through the statutory GP practice levy and voluntary locum subscriptions.

title: GP Support
description: Confidential expert support for GPs and practice staff — GMC investigations, CQC visits, employment matters, wellbeing, and financial assistance.

title: Wellbeing Hub
description: Mental health support, peer networks, crisis lines, free apps, and financial assistance for GPs and primary care staff.

title: Report a Breach
description: Report a contractual breach or unsafe working condition affecting your practice.

title: Resource Library
description: Searchable guidance, policies, and clinical resources for Manchester GPs and practice staff.

title: News & Newsletters
description: Latest news, announcements, and newsletters from Manchester LMC.

title: Events & Meetings
description: Upcoming LMC events, quarterly meetings, and partner events for Manchester GPs.

title: Job Board
description: GP and primary care vacancies across Manchester practices.

title: Members Area
description: Subscriber area for Manchester LMC members — agenda papers, meeting minutes, open forum, and exclusive resources.

title: Contact Us
description: Contact Manchester LMC by phone, email, or online form. Based at Oak House, Beswick, Manchester.
